tasks.label: 🚀 Full Deploy Pipeline
tasks.command: make clean && echo '' && make package && echo '' && echo '🧪 Running tests...' && make test-all && echo '' && ./scripts/deploy-auto.sh && echo '' && echo '✅ Complete! Press Enter to close...' && read
tasks.detail: Complete workflow: clean → build → test → deploy

tasks.label: ⚡ Quick Deploy
tasks.command: make package && ./scripts/deploy-auto.sh && echo '' && echo '✅ Deployed! Press Enter to close...' && read

tasks.label: 🧪 Test & Fix
tasks.command: echo '🔧 Fixing code issues...' && npm run lint:fix 2>/dev/null && npm run format 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '🧪 Running all tests...' && make test-all && echo '' && echo '📊 Test Results:' && echo '  Python: See output above' && echo '  JavaScript: See output above' && echo '' && echo '✅ Complete! Press Enter to close...' && read
tasks.detail: Fix code issues, run tests, show coverage

tasks.label: 👀 Watch Mode
tasks.command: echo 'Starting watch mode (Ctrl+C to stop)...' && echo '' && echo '1) Build watch (if configured)' && echo '2) Test watch' && echo '' && npm run test:watch

tasks.label: 🚀 Initial Setup
tasks.command: echo '🚀 Setting up Launcher Hub...' && echo '' && make setup && echo '' && echo '📦 Installing test dependencies...' && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python deps: Run with proper Python environment' && npm install --save-dev && echo '' && echo '⚙️ Configuring Steam Deck connection...' && ./scripts/configure-env.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'Run ./scripts/configure-env.sh manually if needed' && echo '' && echo '✅ Setup complete! Press Enter to close...' && read

tasks.label: 🔍 Verify & Clean
tasks.command: echo '🔍 Verifying project structure...' && make verify && echo '' && echo '🧹 Cleaning artifacts...' && make clean && echo '' && echo '🔌 Testing Steam Deck connection...' && ./scripts/test-connection.sh && echo '' && echo '✅ Complete! Press Enter to close...' && read
tasks.detail: Check project health, clean, test connection

tasks.label: 🐍 Python Tests
tasks.command: cd tests && python3 run_tests.py && echo '' && echo 'Press Enter to close...' && read

tasks.label: 📦 JavaScript Tests
tasks.command: npm test && echo '' && echo 'Press Enter to close...' && read

tasks.label: 📈 Version Bump
tasks.command: ./scripts/bump-version.sh ${input:newVersion} && echo '' && echo 'Version updated! Press Enter to close...' && read
tasks.detail: Update version in package.json and plugin.json
